toolCall.name: run_command
toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"nix show-derivation .#nixosConfigurations.container.config.system.build.toplevel --extra-experimental-features \"nix-command flakes\" --extra-deprecated-features \"url-literals\" \u003e /dev/null \u0026\u0026 echo \"Valid\" || echo \"Invalid\"","Cwd":"/home/nondeus/CodeRepo/kalinix","WaitMsBeforeAsync":5000,"toolAction":"Evaluating flake output","toolSummary":"Verify if container output is valid"}
